payload.description: M86 SBS launched July 2015 with bus queue jump lanes, lane realignments, upgraded crosswalks, shelters, wayfinding signs, bus arrival information, and off-board fare payment

M79 SBS analysis and design plan investigating similar treatments used for M86 SBS. Project timeline: Fall 2016 finalize traffic analysis, develop street design and service plan, begin construction for off-board fare equipment; Winter 2017 present draft plan to CBs, finalize street design and service plan; Spring 2017 launch SBS

evidence_refs.source_quote: M79 analysis and design plan will investigate similar treatments used for M86 SBS
